# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Pull Request Check
on:
  pull_request_target:
    branches:
      - master
jobs:
  build-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pip install -r requirements.txt
      - name: Run tests
        run: pytest
      - name: Post results as a comment
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          curl \
            --data '{"body": "Tests passed!"}' \
            https://api.github.com/repos/${{ github.repository }}/issues/${{ github.event.number }}/comments
